title: Foreign
description: This includes a texture pack of Crystal PvP Essentials which will help you raise your tier in CPvP and it has been specially made to boost your fps
body:
This pack is designed to make your game look better and feel faster during battles. It adds amazing animations, clear visuals, and makes everything look exciting.
• (11)
Features
> • FPS-Friendly Design Even with high-quality animations, this pack is optimized for low-end PCs, ensuring smooth gameplay without lag.
> • Crystal-Clear Particles Enjoy sharp, vibrant particles during battles that don't clutter your screen but enhance your combat experience.
> • Minimalistic Yet Stylish GUI The custom GUl is simple, clean, and easy to navigate, letting you focus on what matters most—winning your PvP fights!
> • Customized Blocks for PvP Blocks like ores and chests have a more refined look to help you stay efficient and prepared during battles.


**Here’s what this pack offers:**

* Animated Ender Pearls, smooth, captivating animation when throwing pearls

* Black Netherite textures, a clean, refined recolor of Netherite armor and tools

* Supports **Minecraft 1.20.1 – 1.21+**, fully compatible with the latest versions

* Low fire (white variant), shorter flames for better visibility and a sleek aesthetic

* Side-positioned shield, shifts the shield to the side for clearer screen space

* Classic enchantment glint (pre-1.19.4), brings back the old, nostalgic shimmer

* Smaller totem pop + particles, less visual clutter during totem activations

* Tailored for PvP & Survival, enhanced clarity and comfort while preserving vanilla style

* Optimized for performance, lightweight and runs smoothly on most setups

-# Note: This pack was originally kept private by my friends, but I decided to "recreate" it so everyone can enjoy it freely.
